Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service, StorageService

# Test get_mime_type
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('report.pdf'\) == 'application/pdf'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('data.xlsx'\) == 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('unknown.xyz'\) == 'application/octet-stream'
print\('get_mime_type OK'\)

# Test save_file with a mock UploadFile
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test_doc.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

rel_path, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=42\)
print\(f'save_file OK: {rel_path}, {size} bytes'\)
assert rel_path.startswith\('1/42/'\)
assert size == len\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

# Test get_file_path
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
print\(f'get_file_path OK: {abs_path}'\)

# Test delete_file
deleted = storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\)
assert deleted is True
print\('delete_file \(existing\) OK'\)

# Test delete_file idempotent
deleted_again = storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\)
assert deleted_again is False
print\('delete_file \(missing\) OK - idempotent'\)

# Test get_file_path raises on missing
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except FileNotFoundError:
    print\('get_file_path raises FileNotFoundError OK'\)

# Test save without contratto
mock_file2 = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file2.filename = 'busta.pdf'
mock_file2.file = io.BytesIO\(b'data'\)
rel2, _ = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file2, cliente_id=5, contratto_id=None\)
assert rel2.startswith\('5/senza_contratto/'\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel2\)
print\('save_file without contratto OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('All tests passed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service

# Test get_mime_type
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('report.pdf'\) == 'application/pdf'
assert storage_service.get_mime_type\('unknown.xyz'\) == 'application/octet-stream'
print\('get_mime_type OK'\)

# Test save_file
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test_doc.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)
rel_path, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=42\)
print\(f'save_file OK: {rel_path}, {size} bytes'\)
assert rel_path.startswith\('1/42/'\)
assert size == len\(b'fake pdf content for testing'\)

# Test get_file_path
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
print\(f'get_file_path OK'\)

# Test delete_file
assert storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\) is True
print\('delete_file \(existing\) OK'\)
assert storage_service.delete_file\(rel_path\) is False
print\('delete_file \(missing\) idempotent OK'\)

# Test get_file_path raises on missing
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\(rel_path\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except FileNotFoundError:
    print\('get_file_path raises FileNotFoundError OK'\)

# Test save without contratto
mock_file2 = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file2.filename = 'busta.pdf'
mock_file2.file = io.BytesIO\(b'data'\)
rel2, _ = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file2, cliente_id=5, contratto_id=None\)
assert rel2.startswith\('5/senza_contratto/'\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel2\)
print\('save_file without contratto OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('All tests passed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import io
from unittest.mock import MagicMock
from app.storage import storage_service

# Test path traversal è bloccato
try:
    storage_service.get_file_path\('../../../etc/passwd'\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except ValueError as e:
    print\(f'Path traversal blocked in get_file_path: {e}'\)

try:
    storage_service.delete_file\('../../secrets'\)
    assert False, 'should have raised'
except ValueError as e:
    print\(f'Path traversal blocked in delete_file: {e}'\)

# Test percorsi legittimi funzionano ancora
mock_file = MagicMock\(\)
mock_file.filename = 'test.pdf'
mock_file.file = io.BytesIO\(b'content'\)
rel, size = storage_service.save_file\(mock_file, cliente_id=1, contratto_id=None\)
abs_path = storage_service.get_file_path\(rel\)
assert abs_path.is_file\(\)
storage_service.delete_file\(rel\)
print\('Legitimate paths still work'\)

print\('All checks passed'\)
" 2>&)
